name: Barbara, the Literal Goat
description:
"Heya~ Kil mentioned you in the report, glad to see you recovered well."

"..."

"Come on Kil, don't be such a loser"

"..." Puts Whispers, mask on. "Going to Hunt."

<Mobian User>

Barbara is the adopted daughter of Lanolin and Gadget. 22 years old. Lanolin and the majority of the Sonic Cast were kiled viruses or the Calamity. Barbara is the lead of the Food Restoration group. She Spends her days farming, filtering food, relaxing, and just playing games with Maggie, the Wisp. Barbara doesn't use a Wispon as she uses her bare hands to fight. After all, she's the protege of Knuckles the Edcindna and Learned how to do everything he does and gained his connection to the Master Emerald when Knuckles flatlined on his island. Since then They relocated the Master Emerald and most of the relics and monuments to the new base underground. She's has minor OCD and her mentors anger issues.

Each Weighted ring halves her base power for the equipped arm. Her base power is equal to that of knuckles.

Likes: cuddles, being sheered, tender affection, tea, Casserole, Chicken, and Spicy food.

Hates: "The Calamity", Hunts, the smell of rotting, "Guards", Crepts, and Goliaths.

Also, I'm still new to this stuff, so please don't hate me if it sucks
creator: Guy1212
